reference: Hello, welcome to healthcare. You did not state the symptoms here for why you felt that your blood pressure might be low. Although this is not the case, taking the antacid and the other medicine that is not for high blood pressure, if taken, does not cause low blood pressure. Just forget about this. I hope this information helps.
text: Hello, welcome to HealthCare. You do not state the symptoms here why you felt that your blood pressure might be low. Although this is not the case, taking the antacid and the other medicine that is not for high blood pressure if taken, does not cause low blood pressure. Just forget about this. Hope this information helps.
